proof_boundary.notes: This proof prepares local operator, audit, and human-gate evidence only; it is not production/on-prem, independent security, or human UX acceptance evidence.

vs3_human_gate_evidence_status.operator_rule: This command reports redacted record-directory status only. Blank templates, valid structure, and dependency ordering do not record approval, do not unlock dependencies, and do not move VS3-H rows out of HUMAN_REQUIRED.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Dated APPROVE/REJECT record with scope, exceptions, rollback owner, dependency decision.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until signed owner evidence exists; blocks VS3-P and security-sensitive implementation gates as applicable.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Topology diagram, firewall/proxy/network-policy evidence, packet/log transcript, approval.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until real topology evidence exists; blocks VS3-P.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Redacted login, mapping, revocation transcript, owner/security approval.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until real IdP evidence exists; blocks VS3-P.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Redacted provider transcript, approval, ConnectorHub/CornerStone audit refs, result/evidence refs.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until live-provider evidence exists; blocks live readiness claim.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Signed transcript, before/after counts/hashes, restore/rollback result, RLS/policy inventory.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until signed drill evidence exists; blocks migration/restore readiness claim.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: Signed review, test scope/topology, findings, remediation, retest evidence.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until independent evidence exists; blocks VS3-P.

record_statuses.expected_evidence: ACCEPT/REJECT note, screenshots/recording, task outcomes, issue list if rejected.
record_statuses.release_impact: Remains HUMAN_REQUIRED until human acceptance exists; blocks UX acceptance claim.

template_intake_summary.acceptance_boundary: Structural validity only identifies a review record as complete enough for human review; it does not approve evidence, unlock dependencies, or change any VS3-H row from HUMAN_REQUIRED.
